8.reason: [Using scanf with %s only reads until first whitespace, but input expression may contain spaces and ends with '=', so it fails to read full expression]

32.reason: [When i reaches the position of '=', this assigns '=' to cal array. Later logic does not handle '=' as a terminator properly, leading to undefined behavior or incorrect operator processing.]
